name: @girder/fontello
description: Built Fontello files for use in Girder.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist .fontello-session && npx fontello-cli install --config fontello.config.json --css dist/css --font dist/fonts --host https://fontello.com && sed -i 's#/font#/fonts#g' dist/css/fontello.css && rm -f dist/css/fontello-codes.css dist/css/fontello-embedded.css dist/css/fontello-ie7.css dist/css/fontello-ie7-codes.css
